Crow and Heron in Snow
by Isoda Koryūsai
Japan · 1772-1781
The Courtesan Karahama of Yamashiroya Performing the Tea Ceremony (from the series Models for Fahions: New Designs as Fresh as Young Leaves)
by Isoda Koryūsai
